summary: Senior Android engineer with 10+ years building and scaling consumer mobile apps. I care about clean architecture, app performance, and a fast, reliable release process, and I enjoy taking features from rough product ideas to polished, well-tested releases. Experienced leading projects end-to-end and mentoring engineers in cross-functional teams.
Lead Android development for a consumer banking app with several hundred thousand monthly active users, owning architecture decisions and release quality across a small team.
Shipped a redesigned onboarding flow that lifted signup completion by 18% through faster screens, clearer validation, and fewer steps.
Drove an incremental migration to Jetpack Compose, replacing legacy XML screens without slowing the release cadence.
Built core features for a B2B field-service app, working closely with design and backend to ship dependable offline support.
Introduced a modular architecture and a shared component library, cutting feature build time and keeping screens consistent.
Set up CI/CD with Fastlane and automated Play Store releases, reducing release effort from hours to minutes.
Owned the rider-facing Android app end-to-end, from architecture through store releases, across several major versions.
Improved cold-start time by roughly 40% and raised crash-free sessions to 99.7% through profiling and targeted refactors.
Led the team's migration from Java to Kotlin and from RxJava to Coroutines over about 18 months.
Designed a real-time trip-tracking layer with efficient location updates and graceful handling of poor connectivity.
Added unit and Espresso UI tests for critical flows, raising coverage and noticeably reducing regressions.
Improved accessibility across the app, including TalkBack support, larger touch targets, and better contrast.
Mentored two junior engineers and helped establish the team's code-review and release standards.
Developed several client Android apps with a focus on smooth, responsive interfaces.
Built reusable custom UI components that were adopted across multiple projects.
Delivered Android apps for e-commerce and media clients on tight timelines.
Created a configurable app template that let the team spin up branded builds quickly.
Adopted the MVP pattern and improved the testability and modularity of shared code.
Implemented small features and fixed bugs in a production Android app under mentorship.
Learned Git and professional version-control and code-review workflows.
